exercises.analysis: 主语 She 是第三人称单数，go 以 o 结尾加 -es，得到 goes。

exercises.stem: My father _____ (not read) newspapers in the morning.
exercises.analysis: 主语 My father 是第三人称单数，否定用 doesn't + 动词原形 read。

exercises.stem: Which sentence uses simple present tense correctly?

options.label: B
options.text: She washes her hands before meals.

options.label: C
options.text: They goes to school by bus.

exercises.analysis: She 是三单，wash 以 sh 结尾加 -es 得到 washes，正确。A 应为 plays，C 应为 go，D 应为 runs。

exercises.stem: "She doesn't likes music." 这句话语法正确。
exercises.analysis: doesn't 后面动词要用原形，应该是 She doesn't like music. 不能在动词后加 s。

segments: The children _____2_____ (not watch) TV on weekdays.
exercises.analysis: He 是三单，have 的三单形式是 has。The children 是复数，否定用 don't + 动词原形 watch。

exercises.question: 用所给动词的正确形式填空并说明理由：Tom and his sister _____ (play) computer games on Sundays.
exercises.referenceAnswer: 应该填 play。理由：Tom and his sister 是两个人，属于复数主语（相当于 they），不用三单变化，动词用原形 play。
scoringPoints: 能解释 Tom and his sister 是复数主语
能说明只有第三人称单数才需要加 s/es
